name: v05-redis-protected
description: v0.5.2 demo — production middleware stack with workflow-level declaration. Chain runs in order: jwt-auth (verify token, stash claims at ctx.state.identity) → redis-rate-limit (enforce 5/60s per-identity, backed by Redis so the limit holds across restarts and replicas). Both middleware are declared at the workflow level via the v0.5.2 `middleware: [...]` field — applies to every trigger of this workflow without per-trigger duplication. Requires REDIS_URL pointing at a reachable Redis instance (default redis://127.0.0.1:6379). Smoke tests for this workflow are skipped when REDIS_URL is unset; opt in by exporting it before `bun run v05:smoke`.

inputs.expression: ({ ok: true, identity: { sub: ctx.state.identity.sub, iss: ctx.state.identity.iss }, rateLimit: { count: ctx.state['next-state'].count, remaining: 5 - ctx.state['next-state'].count } })
